title: Pokémon GO
genres_all: Spel, Strategi, Rollspel, Hälsa och motion
notes: Trainers, we hope you’re enjoying your adventure in Pokémon GO! We update the app regularly with new events and features, so make sure to check the in-game News to stay up to date.

title: Candy Crush Saga
notes:
Hoppas att du gillar att spela Candy Crush Saga! 

Varje vecka uppdaterar vi spelet med nya inslag, spännande nivåer och viktiga buggfixar som gör spelupplevelsen ännu smidigare. 

Glöm inte att ladda ner den senaste versionen för att få den bästa upplevelsen!

Första gången du spelar? Var inte blyg, det är bara att sätta igång!

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

title: Gossip Harbor®: Merge & Story
notes:
NEW EPISODE EVERY FRIDAY!
- NEW EPISODE: With new chapter updates every Friday; follow Quinn as she exposes secrets and solves puzzles.
- NEW EVENT:Visit Brimwave's Global Goblet watch party and score the Showcase Stage! Join Olivia, Colton, and Harrison and get into the soccer spirit. Explore by collecting points and unlock exclusive decorations to complete the event.

title: Royal Match
notes:
Are you ready for an amazing new update?

• Get ready for amazing 100 NEW LEVELS! Fill it up match by match and paint the board with the COLOR MIXER!

New levels are coming in every two weeks! Be sure to update your game to get the latest content!

- Delta i särskilda födelsedagsevenemang över gården.
- Du kan stänga av eller sätta på födelsedagsmusiken i inställningarna om du vill.

Omgjorda båtbeställningar

title: Clash of Clans
notes:
Going Global!
·   New Global Chat: Join and create Chat Groups with players worldwide and get the latest village news in Town Square!
·   Hero Journey: Earn Ore Chests and tackle unique challenges on a brand-new reward track in the Hero Hall!
·   New Dark Elixir Troop: Ruin Witch crafts loyal Ruin Knights from the debris of destroyed buildings!
·   New Dark Elixir Spell: The Angry Spell raises the tempers of your troops, forcing them to target defenses temporarily.

title: Hero Wars: Alliance Rollspel
notes:
Skuggorna faller över Dominion.

Möt Crow.
Dominions legend är tillbaka på gatorna – med en ny relik, full utrustning och ett skymningsutseende i säsongspasset.

Fallet är inte avslutat än!
Crows äventyr är nu tillgängligt: följ ledtrådarna och lös mysteriet.

Färga dammen röd.
Cascade slår hårdare med sina helt nya röda handskar.

Tristan laddar upp!
Hans nya relik är här – skarpare än någonsin.

title: EA SPORTS FC™ Fotball Mobile
notes:
Spela The World’s Game-uppdateringen. Tävla i en global fotbollsturnering och led ditt landslag till framgång. Upplev autentiska spelarattribut med spelstilar som förverkligar atleternas unika förmågor. Få kontakt med vänner direkt och spela PVP i Snabbmatch. FC Mobile stöder nu hindi, tjeckiska och polska. The World’s Game-uppdateringen innehåller även ett helt nytt nostalgiskt soundtrack.

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. Added new Lightning Tatari: Glowfly with unique Horde Invasion skills.
2. New Tier 4: Humbug→Hierotyrus (Rock), Zaplet→Umbraveil (Lightning).
3. Island Goldrush: Territory Defenders, faster point gains, league rewards final day.
4. Battle: class adjustments, Sand Control/Warship Roll fixes, Dojo bugfix.
5. Evolve Trials: preview higher tiers, event indicators, accurate switch tips.
6. Social: no invites/msgs from blocked players, profile via own avatar.

title: Jelly Busters: Puzzle Game
notes: We are incredibly excited to announce the official launch of Jelly Busters! Drop into the coolest skatepark in town and experience a puzzle game that is as colorful and beautiful as it is satisfying. title: Happy Screw Trip 3D

notes: Our latest update is here, packed with fresh content designed to uplift your travel journey! It’s time to pack your bags and embark on the next chapter of your adventure with us!

title: Call of Duty®: Mobile
notes:
The Phantom Thieves have infiltrated Call of Duty®: Mobile Season 6: Take Your Heart. Answer the Calling Card and deploy as Persona 5 Royal-inspired Operators, including Joker, Panther, and more. Secure the treasure in an all-new Battle Royale LTM, then wield the Mythic FFS Hurricane to complete the perfect heist. Take your time, then Take Over. 

Persona 5 Royal x CODM 

Another season of collaboration is here! Experience a first-of-its-kind integration featuring Legendary Operators inspired by

title: Hotel Legacy: Merge Game
notes:
Update to the latest version!
Map Update: More hotel areas are waiting for you to explore!
New Events: Exciting events are here! Come and experience them!
Improvements: Fixed and polished several issues to make your game experience smoother!

title: Slotomania™ Slots Vegas Casino
notes: Hi Slotomania Fans! Great news! We’ve packed the game with tons of exciting upgrades that will make your Slotomania experience smoother, richer, and more thrilling than ever. New slots are always on the way, and your favorite classics are right here waiting for you. Enjoy bigger wins, faster and smoother gameplay, exciting new features, and incredible quests. It’s the Slotomania you love-only better! Have fun and good luck!

title: Love Island: The Game
notes:
We've made some behind-the-scenes upgrades and improvements.

Until next time, stay sun-kissed and drama-free!

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!

title: Merge Hotel Empire－Design Game
notes: Fixes of critical errors, minor bugfixes, improved overall stability

title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
Want to share the fun? Invite your friends to play and get FREE REWARDS! Join our community on Facebook and Instagram for more fun.
Loving Family Island? Leave a review!

title: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
notes:
1. New Hero: Fallen Scarlet - Hirara: A geisha Assassin wielding Twin Fans: Ukifune, capable of combining them to unleash different combos.
2. S41 will start from 00:00:00 on 06/17 (Server Time). Complete Ranked matches to claim rewards including S41 Seasonal Skin: Zhask "Icespawn Scourge" and S41 Avatar Border "Scarlet Embers".

title: Guns of Glory: Lost Island
notes: - Optimizes the display effects and player experience of some interfaces.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Tacticus ™
notes:
Special "Armageddon" events start June 22, celebrating the release of Warhammer 40,000’s 11th Edition.
Collaborate with other players worldwide in the new Global Home Screen Events!
New "Insanguination" event featuring Cezare begins July 7.
Battle Pass featuring Tarvakh begins June 28.
Last "Perfection Personified" legendary event featuring Lucius on July 26.
See the in‑game notes for full details.

title: Growtopia
notes:
Hello Growtopians,

Summer is in full flow as we welcome July content into the stores!

- The Royal Grow Pass and Subscriber Item!
- The ever returning Voucher Dayz!
- Summer's biggest event is back with SummerFest returning!
- Dungeons calls once more... Keep your eyes ready!
- Grab your shades cuz its time for Beach Party time!
- Bug fixes & optimizations.

Stay safe & play loads Growtopians!

- The Growtopia Team
